metadata.sourceNotes: Source-backed Methana/Troizinia pass 2026-05-28: Exploring Greece describes Akti Agapis as a scenic small cove reached by road, with shallow water, sand/fine pebbles/small rocks, pebble-rock seabed, and not organized; Katheti also mentions the Coast of Love in the central Troizinia beach route. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

accessNotes.en: To Nisaki vrisketai sta Methana, konta sti loutropoli kai tin omonymi mikri chersoniso/nisida. Den anikei stin Argolida kai metaferthike sto sosto Methana scope.
accessNotes.gr: Το Νισάκι βρίσκεται στα Μέθανα, κοντά στη λουτρόπολη και την ομώνυμη μικρή χερσόνησο/νησίδα. Δεν ανήκει στην Αργολίδα και μεταφέρθηκε στο σωστό Methana scope.

waterDepth.notes: Η ακτή περιγράφεται ως βραχώδης/βοτσαλωτή και κατάλληλη για βουτιές από βράχια.

metadata.sourceNotes: Source-backed Methana/Troizinia pass 2026-05-28: Epidavros Villas describes Votsalakia as a small non-organized beach with light rounded pebbles, reached by road/track and a short easy descent, surrounded by rocks/cliffs and suitable for cliff diving; Katheti also describes it with light-colored pebbles, green-blue waters, rocks, and a beach bar. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

metadata.sourceNotes: Source-backed Methana/Troizinia pass 2026-05-28: Exploring Greece describes the junction to Nisiza/Nisida, the road descending toward the sea, a marshy dirt-road branch, and two rocky pebble beaches on the peninsula; Katheti lists Nisiza in the Troizinia beach route. Confidence lifted to medium; coordinates, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.
